sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var( "	SELECT CONCAT(b.domain, b.path)
									FROM {$wpdb->blogs} b
									WHERE blog_id = {$wpdb->blogid}
									LIMIT 1" )

$wpdb->get_var( "	SELECT option_value
									FROM {$wpdb->options}
									WHERE option_name = 'home'
									LIMIT 1" )

sinks.expression: printf( __('There is a new version of %1$s available. %2$sView version %3$s details%4$s.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), //phpcs:ignore esc_html($version_info->name), '', esc_html($version_info->new_version), '' )
printf( __('To enable updates, your licence needs to be renewed. Please go to the %1$sTranslatePress Account%2$s page and login to renew.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), //phpcs:ignore '', '' )

printf( __('To enable updates, please go to the %1$slicense page%2$s and check that you have a valid license.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), //phpcs:ignore esc_url( admin_url( 'admin.php?page=trp_license_key' ) ), '' )

printf( __('To enable updates, please %1$senter your license key%2$s. Need a license key? %3$sPurchase one now%4$s.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), //phpcs:ignore esc_url( admin_url( 'admin.php?page=trp_license_key' ) ), '', '', '' )

printf( __('There is a new version of %1$s available. %2$sView version %3$s details%4$s or %5$supdate now%6$s.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), //phpcs:ignore esc_html($version_info->name), '', esc_html($version_info->new_version), '', '', '' )
wp_die( esc_html__('You do not have permission to install plugin updates', 'translatepress-multilingual'), esc_html__('Error', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('response' => 403))

wp_redirect( add_query_arg( array( 'trp_sl_activation' => 'true', 'message' => urlencode( __( 'You have successfully activated your license', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) ), 'trp_license_nonce' => wp_create_nonce('trp_license_display_message')), $this->license_page_url() ) )

wp_send_json_error([
                'message'      => esc_html__('API key validation failed.', 'translatepress-multilingual'),
                'referrer'     => $machine_translator->get_referer(),
                'response'     => array(
                    'response' => array(
                        'code'    => 'wp_error',
                        'message' => $response->get_error_message(),
                    ),
                    'body'     => $response->get_error_data(),
                ),
                'raw_response' => $full_response,
            ])

wp_send_json_success([
            'message'      => esc_html__('API key verification was successful.', 'translatepress-multilingual'),
            'referrer'     => $machine_translator->get_referer(),
            'response'     => $response,
            'raw_response' => $full_response
        ])

wp_die( '

' . esc_html__( 'Cheatin’ uh?' ) . '

' . //phpcs:ignore WordPress.WP.I18n.MissingArgDomain '

' . esc_html__( 'Sorry, you are not allowed to access this page.' ) . '

', //phpcs:ignore WordPress.WP.I18n.MissingArgDomain 403 )

$wpdb->get_var( "	SELECT CONCAT(b.domain, b.path)
									FROM {$wpdb->blogs} b
									WHERE blog_id = {$wpdb->blogid}
									LIMIT 1" )

$wpdb->get_var( "	SELECT option_value
									FROM {$wpdb->options}
									WHERE option_name = 'home'
									LIMIT 1" )
printf( esc_html__(' Or %1$spurchase one here%2$s', 'translatepress-multilingual'), '', '' )
printf( esc_html__('Manage your license & quota on the %s', 'translatepress-multilingual'), ' ' . esc_html__('TranslatePress.com Account Page', 'translatepress-multilingual') . '' )

wp_die( '

' . esc_html__( 'Cheatin’ uh?' ) . '

' . //phpcs:ignore '

' . esc_html__( 'Sorry, you are not allowed to access this page.' ) . '

', //phpcs:ignore 403 )

$wpdb->query(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "DELETE FROM `{$table}` WHERE `translated` LIKE %s LIMIT %d",
                    '%' . $wpdb->esc_like( strtolower( self::FAILED_STRING ) ) . '%',
                    self::BATCH_SIZE
                )
            )

$wpdb->query(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "DELETE FROM `{$table}` WHERE `translated` LIKE %s LIMIT %d",
                    '%' . $wpdb->esc_like( self::FAILED_STRING ) . '%',
                    self::BATCH_SIZE
                )
            )
printf( esc_html__( 'Manage your license in your %1$s.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), //[utm56] '' . esc_html__( 'Account Page', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) . '' )
printf( esc_html__('Please %1$senter your license%2$s key first to add more languages.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), '', '')
printf( esc_html__('You need an active license to add more languages. Verify in your %1$saccount%2$s that your license is valid', 'translatepress-multilingual'), '', '')
printf( esc_html__('To Add more languages activate the Multiple Languages Addon', 'translatepress-multilingual') )

printf( wp_kses( __( 'Go to  %1$s Appearance -> Menus%2$s to add languages to the Language Switcher in any menu.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), [ 'a' => [ 'href' => [] ] ] ), $link_start, $link_end )

printf( esc_html__( '%sJoin our FREE & EXCLUSIVE onboarding course%s and learn how to grow your multilingual traffic, reach international markets, and save time & money while getting the most out of TranslatePress!', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), '', '' )

printf( wp_kses_post( __( 'Hey %s,
Never miss an important update - opt in to our security and feature updates notifications, and non-sensitive diagnostic tracking.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) ), ''. esc_html($this->get_user_name() ) . '' )

sanitizers.expression: esc_js( __( 'This add-on can not be activated back without a valid license. Are you sure you want to deactivate it?', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )
esc_js( __( 'Add-ons can not be activated back without a valid license. Are you sure you want to deactivate them?', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Customize the date formatting per each translated language.
Leave empty for default WP setting or see more information here', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'title' => array(), 'target' => array() ) ))

wp_kses( __( 'To edit an existing TranslatePress language, input the language code and fill in only the columns you want to overwrite (e.g. Language name, Flag).
You can also add new custom languages. They will be available under General settings, All Languages list, where the URL slug can be edited.' , 'translatepress-multilingual' ), [ 'br' => [] ] )

wp_kses( __( 'For custom flag, first upload the image in media library then paste the URL.
Changing or deleting a custom language will impact translations and site URL\'s.
The Language code and the ISO Code should contain only alphabetical values, numerical values, "-" and "_".
The ISO Codes can be found on Google ISO Codes and DeepL Target Codes.' , 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'title' => array(), 'target' => array() ) ))

wp_kses( __( 'By default, TranslatePress ships its own translation files in wp-content/plugins/translatepress/languages/ and forces WordPress to use them instead of the language packs installed automatically from translate.wordpress.org.
Enable this option to disable that override. WordPress will then load the community language pack from wp-content/languages/plugins/ (if present) and fall back to the bundled files only when no pack is available.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'code' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'It disables detection of strings displayed dynamically using JavaScript.
Strings loaded via a server side AJAX call will still be translated.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Gettext Strings are strings outputted by themes and plugins.
Translating these types of strings through TranslatePress can be unnecessary if they are already translated using the .po/.mo translation file system.
Enabling this option can improve the page load performance of your site in certain cases. The disadvantage is that you can no longer edit gettext translations using TranslatePress, nor benefit from automatic translation on these strings.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array()) )

wp_kses( __( 'Do not include translated links in sitemaps generated by SEO plugins.
Requires SEO Pack Add-on to be installed and activated.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'title' => array(), 'target' => array() ) ) )

wp_kses( __( 'It disables search indexing the post title in translated languages.
Useful when the title of the post doesn\'t allow HTML thus breaking the page.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'It disables search indexing the post content in translated languages.
Useful when the content of the post doesn\'t allow HTML thus breaking the page.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Choose what paths can be translated. Supports wildcard at the end of the path.
For example, to exclude https://example.com/some/path you can either use the rule /some/path/ or /some/*.
Enter each rule on it\'s own line. To exclude the home page use {{home}}.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ))
wp_kses( __( 'Enables the hreflang="x-default" for an entire language. See documentation for more details.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Do not dynamically translate strings that are found in html nodes matching these selectors.
Excludes all the children of HTML nodes matching these selectors from being translated using JavaScript.
These strings will still be translated on the server side if possible.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Exclude these strings from being translated as Gettext strings by TranslatePress. Leave the domain empty to take into account any Gettext string.
Can still be translated through po/mo files.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Do not automatically translate strings that are found in html nodes matching these selectors.
Excludes all the children of HTML nodes matching these selectors from being automatically translated.
Manual translation of these strings is still possible.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Do not translate strings that are found in html nodes matching these selectors.
Excludes all the children of HTML nodes matching these selectors from being translated.
These strings cannot be translated manually nor automatically.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Do not automatically translate these strings (ex. names, technical words...)
Paragraphs containing these strings will still be translated except for the specified part.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'General attempt to fix broken or missing HTML on translated pages.
', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'strong' => array() ) )
wp_kses(__('Ads a slash at the end of the home_url() function', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('br' => array()))

wp_kses( __( 'Choose which hreflang tags will appear on your website.
We recommend showing both types of hreflang tags as indicated by Google documentation.
Removing Country Locale when having multiple Country Locales of the same language (ex. English UK and English US) will result in showing one hreflang tag with link to just one of the region locales for that language.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'title' => array(), 'target' => array() ) ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Change lang attribute of the html tag to a format that includes country regional or not.
In HTML, the lang attribute () should be used to specify the language of text content so that the browser can correctly display or process your content (eg. for hyphenation, styling, spell checking, etc).', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'In case the recent migration to the new slug rewrite is causing trouble, set this to Yes to use the old method
Please open a support ticket letting us know of the issues you are having.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'target' => array() ) ) )

wp_kses( __( "TranslatePress pro-actively scans and saves strings in the database when users access translated pages.
This setting disables this functionality and only allows translation and string saving when inside the Translation Editor.
Also disables machine translation outside the Translation Editor, giving you better control over character spending, by translating only the pages you visit in the Translation Editor.", 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Open the language switcher shortcode by clicking on it instead of hovering.
Close it by clicking on it, anywhere else on the screen or by pressing the escape key. This will affect only the shortcode language switcher.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array()) )

wp_kses( __( 'Transforms the language switcher into a button showing the other available language, not the current one.
Only works when there are exactly two languages, the default one and a translation one.
This will affect the shortcode language switcher and floating language switcher as well.
To achieve this in menu language switcher go to Appearance->Menus->Language Switcher and select Opposite Language.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array()) )
wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Click here to access the database optimization tool.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), admin_url('admin.php?page=trp_remove_duplicate_rows') ) )
wp_kses_post(sprintf( __( 'Here you can observe the last 5 SQL errors relevant to TranslatePress if they exist.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), admin_url('admin.php?page=trp_error_manager') ) )

wp_kses(__('Serve same translation for similar text. The strings need to have a percentage of 95% similarity.
Helps prevent losing existing translation when correcting typos or making minor adjustments to the original text.
If a translation already exists for a very similar original string, it will automatically be used for the current original string.
Does not work when making changes to a text that is part of a translation block unless the new text is manually merged again in a translation block.
Each string needs to have a minimum of 50 characters.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('br' => array()))

wp_kses( __( 'May help fix missing content inserted using JavaScript.
It shows dynamically inserted content in original language for a moment before the translation request is finished.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array()) )

wp_kses( __( 'Filters gettext wrapping such as #!trpst#trp-gettext from all updated post content and post title. Does not affect previous post content.
Database backup is recommended before switching on.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'strong' => array()) )

wp_kses( __( 'Filters gettext wrapping such as #!trpst#trp-gettext from all updated post meta. Does not affect previous post meta.
Database backup is recommended before switching on.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array(), 'strong' => array()) )

wp_kses( sprintf( __('TranslatePress encountered SQL errors. Check out the errors.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), admin_url( 'admin.php?page=trp_error_manager' ) ), array('a' => array('href' => array(), 'title' => array()), 'strong' => array()))
wp_kses( __('Automatic translation has been disabled.','translatepress-multilingual'), array('strong' => array() ) )
wp_kses( sprintf( __('Could not install. Try again from Plugins Dashboard.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), admin_url('plugins.php') ), array('a' => array( 'href' => array() ) ) )

wp_kses( __( 'The selected automatic translation engine does not provide support for these languages.
You can still manually translate pages in these languages using the Translation Editor.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )
wp_kses_post( __( "The language is automatically set based by the last visited language by the user." , 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )

wp_kses_post( __( "By checking this setting the preferred language will remain the one selected above, without the possibility of being changed in the frontend.
This language will be used in different operations such as sending email to the user." , 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )
wp_kses( __( "Hello! Seems like you've been using TranslatePress for a while now to translate your website. That's awesome! ", 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array('strong' => array() ) )

wp_kses( __( 'You cannot select two languages that have the same iso code but different formalities because doing so will lead to duplicate hreflang tags.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), [ 'a' => [ 'href' => [], 'class' => [], 'rel' => [], 'target' => [] ] ] )

wp_kses( __( 'Duplicate language detected.
Each language can only be added once to ensure accurate translation management.
Please change the duplicate language entry and try again. ', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), [ 'br' => [] ] )
esc_js( __( 'Are you sure you want to split this phrase into smaller parts?', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )

wp_kses( __( 'This string is not ready for translation yet.
Try again in a moment...', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )
esc_js( __( 'For this option to work, please update the Browse as other role add-on to the latest version.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )
esc_js( __( 'To translate slugs, please update the SEO Pack add-on to the latest version.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'You can add a new language from Settings->TranslatePress', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), esc_url( admin_url( 'options-general.php?page=translate-press' ) ) ), array( 'a' => [ 'href' => [] ] ) )
wp_kses( __( 'However, you can still use TranslatePress to modify gettext strings available in your page.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'strong' => [ 'style' => [] ] ) )

wp_kses( sprintf( '%s', esc_url( trp_add_affiliate_id_to_link( 'https://translatepress.com/pricing/?utm_source=tp-editor&utm_medium=client-site&utm_campaign=tp-editor-upsell' ) ), __( 'Upgrade to PRO', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) ), array( 'a' => [ 'class' => [], 'target' => [], 'href' => [] ] ) )

wp_kses( sprintf( '%s', esc_url( trp_add_affiliate_id_to_link( 'https://translatepress.com/black-friday/?utm_source=tp-editor&utm_medium=client-site&utm_campaign=bf-2025' ) ), __( 'Upgrade to PRO', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) ), array( 'a' => [ 'class' => [], 'target' => [], 'href' => [] ] ) )

wp_kses(sprintf( __( 'Hover any text on the page, click %s,
then modify the translation in the sidebar.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), $edit_icon), array( 'svg' => array( 'class' => array(),'xmlns' => array(),'visibility'=>array(), 'viewbox' => array(), 'aria-hidden' => array(), 'focusable' => array() ), 'path' => array('d'=>array() ), "br" => array() ) )
wp_kses( __( 'Don\'t forget to Save Translation. Use keyboard shortcut CTRL(⌘) + S', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array() )
wp_kses( __( 'Switch language to see the translation changes directly on the page.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array() )
wp_kses( __( 'Search for any text in this page in the dropdown.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array() )
wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Your %s license has expired.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), '' . $translatepress_product . '' ), array( 'strong' => array(),'span' => array( 'class' => array() ) ) )
wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Your %s license was refunded.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), '' . $translatepress_product . '' ), array( 'strong' => array(),'span' => array( 'class' => array() ) ) )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'Your %s license is missing or invalid.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), '' . $translatepress_product . '' ), array( 'strong' => array(),'span' => array( 'class' => array() ) ) )

wp_kses( sprintf( __('Database optimization did not complete successfully. We recommend restoring the original database or trying again.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), admin_url('admin.php?page=trp_update_database') ), array('a' => array( 'href' => array() ) ) )

wp_kses( __( 'TranslatePress requires Multibyte String PHP library. Please contact your server administrator to install it on your server.','translatepress-multilingual' ), [ 'a' => [ 'href' => [] ], 'strong' => [] ] )

$wpdb->prepare("DELETE FROM $wpdb->postmeta WHERE post_id = %d AND (meta_key LIKE %s OR meta_key LIKE %s);", $trp_post_id_for_deleting_duplicate_posts_slugs_from_db, '%'. $wpdb->esc_like('trp_automatically_translated_slug') .'%', '%'. $wpdb->esc_like('trp_translated_slug') .'%')

wp_kses( __( 'Visit this link to see how you can set up an API key, control API costs and set HTTP referrer restrictions.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), [ 'a' => [ 'href' => [], 'title' => [], 'target' => [] ], 'strong' => [] ] )
wp_kses(__('You have a valid %s license.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array( 'strong' => array() ) )
wp_kses(__('You have a valid %s license.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('strong' => array()))

$wpdb->prepare(
                    "DELETE FROM `{$table}` WHERE `translated` LIKE %s LIMIT %d",
                    '%' . $wpdb->esc_like( strtolower( self::FAILED_STRING ) ) . '%',
                    self::BATCH_SIZE
                )

$wpdb->prepare(
                    "DELETE FROM `{$table}` WHERE `translated` LIKE %s LIMIT %d",
                    '%' . $wpdb->esc_like( self::FAILED_STRING ) . '%',
                    self::BATCH_SIZE
                )

wp_kses( sprintf( __( 'TranslatePress requires at least PHP version 5.6.20+ to run. It is the minimum requirement of the latest WordPress version. Please contact your server administrator to update your PHP version.','translatepress-multilingual' ), 'https://wordpress.org/about/requirements/' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array() ), 'strong' => array() ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( /* Translators: The
ensures a line break after "order to" */ esc_html__('Choose which engine you want to use in order to %1$s automatically translate your website.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), '
' ) )

wp_kses( __('Generate automatic translations of slugs for posts, pages and Custom Post Types.
The slugs will be automatically translated starting with the second refresh of each page.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), ['br' => []] )

wp_kses( __('Block crawlers from triggering automatic translations on your website.
This will not prevent crawlers from accessing this site\'s pages.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), ['br' => []] )

wp_kses( __('Only enable for testing purposes. Can impact performance.
All records are stored in the wp_trp_machine_translation_log database table. Use a plugin like WP Data Access to browse the logs or directly from your database manager (PHPMyAdmin, etc.)', 'translatepress-multilingual'), ['br' => [], 'a' => ['href' => [], 'target' => [], 'title' => []]] )
wp_kses( __( 'Select the languages you wish to make your website available in.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array() )

wp_kses( __( 'Check if you want to add the subdirectory in the URL for the default language.</br>By checking this option, the default language seen by website visitors will become the first one in the "All Languages" list.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), array( 'br' => array() ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __('You can also add the Language Switcher Block in the WP Gutenberg Editor.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), esc_url('https://translatepress.com/docs/settings/?utm_source=tp-language-switcher&utm_medium=client-site&utm_campaign=ls-block#language-switcher-block' ) ) )
wp_kses( __( 'Go to  %1$s Appearance -> Menus%2$s to add languages to the Language Switcher in any menu.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ), [ 'a' => [ 'href' => [] ] ] )

wp_kses_post( __( 'Hey %s,
Never miss an important update - opt in to our security and feature updates notifications, and non-sensitive diagnostic tracking.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )
wp_kses_post( __( 'IMPORTANT NOTE: Before performing this action it is strongly recommended to first backup the database.', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )
esc_js( __( 'IMPORTANT: It is strongly recommended to first backup the database!! Are you sure you want to continue?', 'translatepress-multilingual' ) )

wp_kses(__('Removes CDATA from trp_original_strings and trp_dictionary_* tables.
This type of content should not be detected by TranslatePress. It might have been introduced in the database in older versions of the plugin.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('br' => array()))

wp_kses(__('Removes untranslated links and images from all trp_dictionary_* tables. These tables contain translations for user-inputted strings such as post content, post title, menus etc.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('br' => array()))
wp_kses(__('Cleans up all trp_gettext_* tables of duplicate rows. These tables contain translations for themes and plugin strings.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('br' => array()))

wp_kses(__('Cleans up all trp_dictionary_* tables of duplicate rows. These tables contain translations for user-inputted strings such as post content, post title, menus etc.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('br' => array()))

wp_kses(__('Cleans up all trp_original_strings table of duplicate rows. This table contains strings in the default language, without any translation.
The trp_original_meta table, which contains meta information that refers to the post parent’s ID, is also regenerated.
Such duplicates can appear in exceptional situations of unexpected behavior.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('br' => array()))

wp_kses(__('Fixes an edge case issue where some gettext strings have the original ID incorrectly set to NULL, causing problems in the Translation Editor.
This operation corrects the original IDs in the trp_gettext_* tables.
Only check this option if you encountered an issue in the Translation Editor where clicking the green pencil did not bring up the gettext string for translation in the left sidebar.
Otherwise, please leave this option unchecked because it\'s an intensive operation.', 'translatepress-multilingual'), array('br' => array()))
